summary: Frontend-only verification of iter-118 tile-grid menu replacing the legacy hamburger drawer. Tested all 3 role variants (Admin/Implant-Incharge, Student, Nurse) at viewport 390x844 against the deployed preview URL. All key behaviors verified end-to-end: header grid icon, popover open/close, identity row, role-based tile visibility, navigation routing, backdrop close, close-btn close, tap-inside-no-close, and logout flow.

issues: Console warning: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' â€” sheet style uses shadowColor/shadowOffset/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius which are deprecated on react-native-web. Migrate to boxShadow to silence the warning (cosmetic only, not breaking).

design_issues.screen: Discussion Forum (/forum) â€” pre-existing, unrelated to iter-118
issues: Console error observed when navigating to Forum: 'Unexpected text node: . A text node cannot be a child of a <View>.' (twice). Not introduced by this iteration but worth flagging.

verified_behaviors.header_grid_icon: PASS â€” Ionicons 'grid' icon (24px, color #1565C0) rendered with testID 'hamburger-btn' (legacy testID retained as documented).
verified_behaviors.popover_open: PASS â€” Tap opens tile-menu-sheet with translucent dark backdrop (rgba(15,25,40,0.45)). Sheet is top-anchored and auto-sized to its content (does NOT cover full screen).
verified_behaviors.identity_row: PASS â€” Avatar (placeholder blue with person icon when no profile_photo, Image when present), bold name, capitalized role; close button on top-right ('tile-menu-close').
verified_behaviors.tiles_admin: PASS â€” Abhijit.patil sees 4 tiles: tile-users, tile-profile, tile-archived, tile-forum.
verified_behaviors.tiles_student: PASS â€” Gaurav.pandey sees 3 tiles: tile-profile, tile-archived, tile-forum (no tile-users).
verified_behaviors.tiles_nurse: PASS â€” nurse.1@dental.edu sees only tile-profile; tile-users/tile-archived/tile-forum hidden as expected. Identity shows 'Nurse 1' / 'Nurse'.
verified_behaviors.navigation: PASS â€” Admin: all 4 tiles navigate correctly (tile-usersâ†’/user-management, tile-profileâ†’/profile, tile-archivedâ†’/archived, tile-forumâ†’/forum). Student: tile-profileâ†’/profile, tile-archivedâ†’/archived verified. Nurse: tile-profileâ†’/profile verified. Sheet closes cleanly after every nav.
verified_behaviors.backdrop_close: PASS â€” Tap on dark overlay (testID tile-menu-overlay) closes the sheet.
verified_behaviors.close_btn: PASS â€” Tap tile-menu-close closes the sheet.
verified_behaviors.tap_inside_no_close: PASS â€” Tap inside the sheet body (non-button area) does NOT close the popover (Pressable.stopPropagation on inner Pressable works).
verified_behaviors.logout: PASS â€” tile-menu-logout closes popover, calls logout(), and returns user to login screen for all 3 roles.
verified_behaviors.red_dot_header: PARTIAL â€” Could not observe header red-dot in this run because Nurse 'What's-new' was dismissed and Admin/Student had no unseen entries at test time. Code path confirmed: header reddot renders when (hasUnseenWhatsNew || hasUnreadForum) and uses testID 'profile-whatsnew-reddot'.
verified_behaviors.tile_badge: PASS â€” Student popover screenshot shows the small red dot on the top-right of the Forum tile's icon chip (hasUnreadForum=true). Profile tile receives the same treatment when hasUnseenWhatsNew=true (code verified).

action_items: (Cosmetic, non-blocking) Replace deprecated shadow* style props on `t.sheet` with `boxShadow` to silence react-native-web deprecation warning.

(Pre-existing, unrelated to iter-118) Investigate the Forum-page console error 'Unexpected text node: . A text node cannot be a child of a <View>.' â€” likely a stray whitespace/string child in /app/frontend/app/forum/* JSX.
critical_code_review_comments: Legacy style block `d` in _layout.tsx is now dead code (kept intentionally per the iteration note). Recommend a follow-up cleanup PR to remove it once stable to keep the file lean (~556 lines is fine, but `d` is unreferenced).
DrawerMenu component name still says 'Drawer' although it now renders a tile grid; rename to TileMenu for clarity in a future cleanup.
Tile sheet does not implement focus trap / keyboard dismiss handling â€” fine for mobile, but worth noting for web a11y if/when desktop support is added.

`onNavigate` uses setTimeout(..., 100) before router.push to allow modal-close animation to settle. This works, but a cleaner pattern would be to await the modal's onModalHide callback (RN's Modal does fire onDismiss on iOS only). Acceptable for now.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 11 review-list bullets pass; 1 partial due to lack of unseen-whatsnew test data, code path verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter-118 tile menu is fully functional. Next agent should NOT re-test the tile-menu UI unless changed. Note: When testing other flows that involve the menu, dismiss the 'What's new' modal first (click 'Got it â€” take me to my dashboard') for users with unseen entries â€” this happens for first-time login of nurse.1@dental.edu and may also surface for other users when admin pushes new whatsnew entries. Use force=True on Playwright clicks against react-native-web modal/tabs because absolutely-positioned tab-bar overlays sometimes intercept pointer events under strict-stable mode.
rca of the issue: N/A â€” no bugs reproduced in iter-118 scope.
